summary: Multiple Gradle tasks checking Kotlin Gradle plugin configuration are failing across several modules (spring-boot-test, spring-boot-docs, spring-boot, spring-boot-jpa-test, spring-boot-kotlinx-serialization-json), followed by Docker daemon conflicts preventing container cleanup. Job exits with code 1.
root_cause: Gradle checkKotlinGradlePluginConfigurationErrors tasks are failing in multiple modules, and Docker daemon encounters conflicts when attempting to clean up containers (unable to delete image IDs f3b50677289c and 05e540d2c2f6)

evidence.reason: Multiple truncated Gradle task names indicate checkKotlinGradlePluginConfigurationErrors failures in multiple modules

evidence.quote: Error response from daemon: conflict: unable to delete f3b50677289c
evidence.reason: Docker daemon unable to delete container/image due to conflict, indicating cleanup failure

evidence.quote: Error response from daemon: conflict: unable to delete 05e540d2c2f6
evidence.reason: Second Docker daemon conflict error confirming resource cleanup issue
Build job exited with error code, confirming failure

suggested_fix: Inspect the full error output from checkKotlinGradlePluginConfigurationErrors tasks to identify the specific Kotlin Gradle plugin configuration issues; verify Docker daemon state and clean up stale containers/images before re-running the build
